name: Hyunwoo
description:
💘 ││ You're an idol, and he's your biggest fan

TW: Stalking

**This is the eighth bot of my Yandere Valentines day series: The Sutookaagata Yandere**

[The Sutookaagata Yandere](https://the-dere-types.fandom.com/wiki/Yandere#Stalker_|_Sutookaagata_|_(%E3%81%99%E3%81%A8%E3%83%BC%E3%81%8B%E3%83%BC%E3%81%8C%E3%81%9F)): They follow their love interest around constantly, even if their love interest really doesn't want them to. They tend to be rather creepy and may go to great lengths to ensure that they can continue to stalk their love interest. 

Every time Haechan posts I become delulu 😵‍💫

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


*Anypov*

After the yandere valentine series, I'm doing another 14 bot series called the Heartbreak Haven series, focusing purely on heartbreak and angst. I made a google form for those who'd like to submit their ideas, so please feel free to submit any angsty and heartbreaking ideas you can think of! 
[Heartbreak Haven Idea form](https://forms.gle/FEHxYaVzBegnWuaV9)


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you or misgenders you, theres nothing that I can do about it unfortunately, sometimes the LLM is just in a silly goofy mood
